name: fi.ophis/mcp
title: Ophis MCP
description: Agent-facing tools for the Ophis intent-based DEX: parse swap intents, fetch best-execution quotes, build bounded ready-to-sign CoW orders, relay pre-signed orders, and look up fee-rebate tiers. Keyless and unauthenticated: the server never holds keys or signs; build_order pins the order receiver to the owner.
